title: deserialize_optional_nullable_string encodes three-state absent/null/present for partial-update fields
description: ChatPresenceEvent.status_text and status_emoji use Option<Option<String>> with a custom deserializer. The three states have distinct semantics per spec: field absent = no change (keep current value); field null = explicit clear (set to None); field string = update to new value. A contributor might suggest simplifying to Option<String> (absent/null -> None, string -> Some). That collapses 'no change' and 'explicit clear' into the same None, making it impossible for the client to distinguish 'server did not send a status update' from 'server said clear the status'. The custom deserializer is also protected by a test (test_deserialize_optional_nullable_string_rejects_non_string) that rejects non-string non-null values, preventing silent misparse of malformed payloads.
